name: taskflow-ai
description: Asistente de productividad inteligente con IA para gestión de tareas

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:mobile && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile && npm run lint:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd web && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:web && npm run setup:mobile
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate

author: Tu Nombre
